page.404.title: Page not found | SmartAgents
page.404.heading: Page not found
page.404.text: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.
hero.title: Transform your business with intelligent automation
hero.subtitle: Smarter workflows. Lower costs. Measurable results.
vision.title: Vision
vision.headline: A world where every business has intelligent digital colleagues
vision.text: We envision a future where AI doesn't replace people — it amplifies them. Where every business, regardless of size, has access to intelligent automation that handles the routine, so humans can focus on the extraordinary.
mission.title: Mission
mission.headline: Making AI practical, accessible, and human-centered
mission.text: We build autonomous AI agents and automation solutions that deliver measurable results from day one. No hype, no black boxes — just intelligent systems that work alongside your team, under your control.
values.title: Values
values.headline: Transparency, trust, and real impact
values.text: We believe in honest communication, measurable results, and long-term partnerships. Every solution we build is rooted in integrity — no hidden complexity, no empty promises. Just technology that genuinely makes a difference.
services.title: Our services
services.subtitle: From analysis and process improvement to AI, automation, and adoption: we help you build smarter, manageable workflows step by step.
services.agentic.title: Agentic automation
services.agentic.desc: Autonomous AI agents that can reason, plan, and execute complex tasks. We build intelligent systems that work with your organization while you always remain fully in control.
services.process.title: Process optimization
services.process.desc: We map processes clearly, remove bottlenecks and waste, and redesign the way work gets done for more calm, speed, and control.
services.training.title: Training
services.training.desc: We help your people use AI in a smart and practical way in their daily work, regardless of their prior knowledge or experience level. Through focused workshops and training, we strengthen knowledge, confidence, and adoption across your organization.
services.smartscan.title: Smart Scan
approach.title: Our approach
approach.subtitle: From idea to results in 5 steps
approach.step1.title: Smart Scan
approach.step1.desc: We map your processes and bottlenecks. Where can AI make the difference?
approach.step2.title: Design
approach.step2.desc: We design a tailored approach: we optimize your workflows and determine where one or more AI agents, automations, and integrations can make the biggest impact.
approach.step3.title: Development
approach.step3.desc: We build and test the solution step by step. You stay involved, give feedback, and quickly see what works in practice.
approach.step4.title: Implementation
approach.step4.desc: We implement everything in your environment and make sure the new workflows connect smoothly with your existing systems and way of working.
approach.step5.title: Optimization & support
approach.step5.desc: We keep optimizing, refining, and expanding where needed, so your processes become smarter and continue to deliver results.
about.title: Why choose SmartAgents?
about.desc: We combine technical depth with a pragmatic approach. We start from the way your organization works, determine where AI and automation truly add value, and build solutions that are understandable, manageable, and measurably results-driven.
about.feature1: Industry-leading expertise in AI and automation
about.feature2: Proven track record across multiple industries
about.feature4: Scalable solutions that grow with your business
team.title: Meet our team
team.subtitle: The experts behind SmartAgents, dedicated to transforming your business
team.axel.bio: Entrepreneur with 20+ years experience in digital transformation. Passionate about helping businesses leverage intelligent automation.
team.tom.bio: Technical architect specializing in agentic AI systems and enterprise automation. Builds scalable solutions that drive real results.
team.agents.name: People with a vision, agents on a mission
team.agents.bio: Our smart human and AI agents creating value-driven results.
testimonials.title: What our clients say
testimonials.subtitle: Trusted by innovative companies across industries
testimonials.1.text: "SmartAgents transformed our customer service with their AI solution. Response times dropped by 60% while satisfaction scores increased dramatically."
testimonials.2.text: "The process automation they implemented saved us hundreds of hours monthly. Their team truly understands business needs and delivers results."
testimonials.3.text: "Working with SmartAgents was a game-changer. Their agentic AI system handles complex tasks that we thought only humans could do."
contact.title: Let's talk
contact.subtitle: Ready to optimize your business? Get in touch with our team.
contact.form.name: Name
contact.form.subject: New message via smartagents.be
customerzone.subtitle: Your personal customer zone
jobs.hero.title: Join our team
jobs.hero.subtitle: Help us build the future of autonomous AI agents. We're looking for people who want to do the most impactful work of their career.
jobs.vision.title: The vision
jobs.vacancies.title: Open positions
jobs.vacancies.freelance: Freelance profiles are also welcome — feel free to reach out.
jobs.vision.text: At SmartAgents, we build systems that do real work: from copilots and automations to autonomous AI agents for complex processes. You help create solutions that are used in real business environments, with direct impact on how organizations operate.
jobs.role.title: Agentic AI Developer
jobs.role.subtitle: What you'll be doing
jobs.role.item1.title: Multi-agent systems
jobs.role.item1.desc: Build solutions that improve real business processes, from copilots and workflow automation to multi-agent systems.
jobs.role.item2.title: LLMs & cutting-edge AI
jobs.role.item2.desc: Work with LLMs, tool use, RAG, and integrations with existing systems to make solutions useful in practice.
jobs.role.item3.title: Scalable pipelines
jobs.role.item3.desc: Translate technical possibilities into scalable applications that fit real operational workflows.
jobs.role.item4.title: Ship & iterate
jobs.role.item4.desc: Work in short iterations, take ownership, and quickly see the effect of what you build.
jobs.role2.title: Business Analyst – Process Optimisation
jobs.role2.subtitle: What you'll be doing
jobs.role2.item1.title: Process analysis & mapping
jobs.role2.item1.desc: Analyse existing workflows, identify inefficiencies, and document processes ready for AI-driven automation.
jobs.role2.item2.title: Translating AI opportunities
jobs.role2.item2.desc: Turn business needs into concrete AI use cases in collaboration with the technical and commercial team.
jobs.role2.item3.title: Stakeholder management
jobs.role2.item3.desc: Work closely with clients and internal teams, facilitate workshops, and guide implementations from start to measurable result.
jobs.role2.item4.title: Measuring impact
jobs.role2.item4.desc: Define KPIs, track outcomes, and report the measurable impact of optimised and automated processes.
jobs.benefits.title: Why join SmartAgents
jobs.benefit1.title: Cutting-edge tech
jobs.benefit1.desc: Work with the latest in AI, LLMs & agentic systems
jobs.benefit2.title: Equity & ownership
jobs.benefit2.desc: Share in the upside — build something that's yours too
jobs.benefit3.title: Full flexibility
jobs.benefit4.title: Real autonomy
jobs.benefit4.desc: Own your domain, make decisions, move fast
jobs.team.title: The team
jobs.team.text: Axel Segers brings 20+ years of experience in digital transformation, entrepreneurship and strategy. Tom Haeldermans is a technical architect specializing in agentic AI systems and enterprise automation. Together, we've built SmartAgents from the ground up — and we're looking for the right people to grow with us. Small team = big ownership, zero bureaucracy, maximum velocity.
jobs.cta.title: Interested? Let's talk
jobs.cta.text: We're not looking for just any developer. We want someone who sees the future of AI and wants to build it with us. If you're ready to do the most impactful work of your career, reach out.
services.common.usecases.title: Typical use cases
services.common.related.title: Related services
services.common.related.subtitle: Common next steps after this service.
services.ai.page.subtitle: Custom AI models and machine learning solutions tailored to your business needs.
services.ai.page.overview.title: What is AI and why does it matter?
services.ai.page.overview.text: For many organizations, AI today starts with generative AI and LLMs: systems that understand text, generate content, unlock knowledge, and support employees more intelligently in their daily work. We build tailored AI solutions that go further — from copilots and intelligent assistants to predictive analytics, natural language processing, and computer vision.
services.ai.page.features.title: Our solutions
services.ai.page.feature1.title: Copilots & generative AI
services.ai.page.feature1.desc: Let AI support daily work by drafting text, summarizing information, and helping employees think and work faster.
services.ai.page.feature2.title: Knowledge, language & content
services.ai.page.feature2.desc: Make internal knowledge easier to access, understand large volumes of text, and unlock more value from documents and communication.
services.ai.page.feature3.title: Analysis, prediction & recognition
services.ai.page.feature3.desc: Use AI to detect patterns, predict trends, and analyze images or data more intelligently.
services.ai.page.benefits.title: Benefits for your business
services.ai.page.benefit1.title: Data-driven decisions
services.ai.page.benefit1.desc: Replace gut feeling with actionable insights from your data.
services.ai.page.benefit2.title: Time savings
services.ai.page.benefit2.desc: Automate repetitive analysis tasks and free your team for strategic work.
services.ai.page.benefit3.title: Scalable intelligence
services.ai.page.benefit3.desc: Models that grow with your business and improve over time.
services.ai.page.cta.title: Ready to put AI to work?
services.ai.page.cta.text: Let's explore how artificial intelligence can transform your business processes and unlock new opportunities.
services.agentic.page.subtitle: Autonomous AI agents that reason, plan, and execute complex tasks alongside your team.
services.agentic.page.overview.title: What is agentic AI?
services.agentic.page.overview.text: Agentic AI goes beyond traditional automation. These are intelligent systems that can independently reason about problems, plan multi-step solutions, use tools, and execute complex workflows — all while your team stays in control. Think of them as digital colleagues that handle end-to-end tasks 24/7, from customer onboarding to supply chain decisions.
services.agentic.page.features.title: Our services
services.agentic.page.feature1.title: Multi-agent systems
services.agentic.page.feature1.desc: Teams of specialized AI agents that collaborate to solve complex business problems end-to-end.
services.agentic.page.feature2.title: Tool-use & integrations
services.agentic.page.feature2.desc: Agents that connect to your existing systems, APIs, and databases to take real actions.
services.agentic.page.feature3.title: Autonomous reasoning
services.agentic.page.feature3.desc: Agents that reason about problems, break them into steps, and adapt their approach based on results.
services.agentic.page.feature4.title: Human-in-the-loop
services.agentic.page.feature4.desc: Your team stays in control with approval workflows and oversight for critical decisions.
services.agentic.page.benefits.title: Benefits for your business
services.agentic.page.benefit1.title: 24/7 operations
services.agentic.page.benefit1.desc: AI agents that work around the clock without breaks or downtime.
services.agentic.page.benefit2.title: Scale without hiring
services.agentic.page.benefit2.desc: Handle growing workloads without proportionally growing your team.
services.agentic.page.benefit3.title: Consistent quality
services.agentic.page.benefit3.desc: Eliminate human error and ensure every task is executed to the same high standard.
services.agentic.page.cta.title: Ready for autonomous AI agents?
services.agentic.page.cta.text: Let's explore how agentic AI can handle your most complex workflows and free your team to focus on what matters most.
services.process.page.subtitle: Rethink and improve the way your processes run so teams can work more smoothly and technology is only applied where it truly helps.
services.process.page.overview.title: Why optimize your processes?
services.process.page.overview.text: Many organizations lose time and energy in processes that have grown historically but no longer work in a logical way. We map how your organization operates, identify bottlenecks, handoffs between teams, and waste, and redesign processes so they become simpler, clearer, and more efficient. Only then do we determine where automation or AI adds real value.
services.process.page.features.title: Our services
services.process.page.feature1.title: Process analysis
services.process.page.feature1.desc: We map your current way of working in detail and make visible where delays, errors, duplication, and ambiguity arise.
services.process.page.feature2.title: Process redesign
services.process.page.feature2.desc: We rethink steps, roles, and transitions between people and teams so processes become simpler, more logical, and easier to scale.
services.process.page.feature3.title: Priorities & improvement plan
services.process.page.feature3.desc: You get a clear view of which improvements should come first and where automation or AI will create the most value afterward.
services.process.page.benefits.title: Benefits for your business
services.process.page.benefit1.title: Cost reduction
services.process.page.benefit1.desc: Eliminate waste and reduce operational costs with leaner processes.
services.process.page.benefit2.title: Faster throughput
services.process.page.benefit2.desc: Get more done in less time with streamlined workflows.
services.process.page.benefit3.title: Happier teams
services.process.page.benefit3.desc: Remove frustrating bottlenecks and let your people focus on meaningful work.
services.process.page.cta.title: Ready to optimize?
services.process.page.cta.text: Let's map your processes together and find the opportunities to save time, money, and frustration.
services.automation.page.subtitle: End-to-end automation solutions that reduce manual work and eliminate human error.
services.automation.page.overview.title: Why automate?
services.automation.page.overview.text: Manual, repetitive tasks cost your business time and money while introducing errors. We build automations that take over recurring work, connect systems, and make follow-up run more smoothly. The result: less manual effort, fewer mistakes, and more time for work that creates real value.
services.automation.page.features.title: Our services
services.automation.page.feature1.title: Automating recurring tasks
services.automation.page.feature1.desc: Let repetitive work such as data entry, copy-pasting, and administrative follow-up run automatically.
services.automation.page.feature2.title: Streamlining documents & follow-up
services.automation.page.feature2.desc: Process quotes, invoices, requests, and other documents faster and more consistently, with automatic follow-up where needed.
services.automation.page.feature3.title: Connecting workflows & systems
services.automation.page.feature3.desc: Make systems, teams, and process steps work together better by automating approvals, handoffs, and multi-step workflows.
services.automation.page.benefits.title: Benefits for your business
services.automation.page.benefit1.title: Hours saved daily
services.automation.page.benefit1.desc: Reclaim hours spent on manual data entry, copy-pasting, and routine tasks.
services.automation.page.benefit2.title: Zero errors
services.automation.page.benefit2.desc: Eliminate costly mistakes from manual data handling and processing.
services.automation.page.benefit3.title: Instant scalability
services.automation.page.benefit3.desc: Handle 10x the volume without adding headcount or complexity.
services.automation.page.cta.title: Ready to automate?
services.automation.page.cta.text: Let's identify your biggest automation opportunities and start saving time and money immediately.
services.training.page.subtitle: Practical training and workshops that help your people use AI safely, intelligently, and effectively in their daily work.
services.training.page.overview.title: Why invest in AI training?
services.training.page.overview.text: AI only delivers real value when people understand what it can do, where the limits are, and how to use it responsibly in their daily work. Our training is practical, tailored to your context, and suitable for every level — from a first introduction to focused deep-dives for teams that want to apply it immediately.
services.training.page.features.title: Our training offer
services.training.page.feature1.title: Foundations & confidence
services.training.page.feature1.desc: For people who want to understand AI better: what it is, what it can do, where the risks are, and how to work with it meaningfully.
services.training.page.feature2.title: Practical workshops
services.training.page.feature2.desc: Hands-on sessions around concrete tools, prompts, use cases, and applications that are directly useful in day-to-day work.
services.training.page.feature3.title: Team-focused deep dives
services.training.page.feature3.desc: More advanced training tailored to a specific team or function, based on the tools, processes, and questions that matter in practice.
services.training.page.benefits.title: Benefits for your organization
services.training.page.benefit1.title: Faster adoption
services.training.page.benefit1.desc: Teams that understand AI adopt new tools faster and find more use cases.
services.training.page.benefit2.title: Higher productivity
services.training.page.benefit2.desc: Empowered employees who use AI tools effectively every day.
services.training.page.benefit3.title: Reduced risk
services.training.page.benefit3.desc: Teams that understand AI limitations make better decisions and avoid costly mistakes.
services.training.page.benefit4.title: Lasting return
services.training.page.benefit4.desc: Training that sticks through hands-on exercises and a learning path aligned with your people's day-to-day work context.
services.training.page.benefit5.title: Less dependency on external help
services.training.page.benefit5.desc: Employees who understand and apply AI themselves reduce the need for outside support on routine tasks and minor adjustments.
services.training.page.cta.title: Ready to upskill your team?
services.training.page.cta.text: Let's design a training program tailored to your team's needs and goals. On-site or remote, for any level.
services.training.page.tree.intro: Our training is built in two phases. Courses 01 and 02 are for everyone: from understanding AI to using it daily. After that, the path branches based on your role — managers, power users, and developers each follow their own specialisation.
services.training.page.tree.split.title: Choose your learning path
services.training.page.tree.split.subtit: After course 02, the path splits based on your role
services.training.page.course1.title: AI Awareness: the basics
services.training.page.course1.desc: Discover what AI really is, how large language models (LLMs) work, and why AI strengthens your job rather than replacing it. With concrete guidelines for GDPR and privacy in the Belgian context.
services.training.page.course2.title: AI in practice: working smarter
services.training.page.course2.desc: Hands-on training for everyday tasks. We use demos of AI tools and provide recordings so your team can follow along or revisit them later. You learn to communicate with AI tools — not to build them.
services.training.page.courseM.title: AI for management: strategy, transformation & security
services.training.page.courseM.desc: Lead an AI-powered organization with confidence. From ROI calculations and change management to the EU AI Act and data sovereignty — everything you need to know as a leader.
services.training.page.course3.title: Prompt engineering & AI tools mastery
services.training.page.course3.desc: From AI user to advanced AI user. Learn advanced context management, build multi-step instruction sequences, and use AI tools more effectively for more complex workflows.
services.training.page.courseD.title: AI for developers: tools & integrations
services.training.page.courseD.desc: AI-assisted coding with GitHub Copilot and Claude Code. API cost management, smart AI integrations, and building secure AI features grounded in your own data and systems.
services.secure.page.subtitle: We help you use AI securely and in a manageable way, with clear rules around data, access, and responsible use.
services.secure.page.overview.title: Why security matters for AI
services.secure.page.overview.text: AI brings speed and new possibilities, but also new risks. Which data may be used? Who gets access? Which tools are acceptable? And how do you keep everything controllable? We help you make clear decisions and organize your AI solutions so they remain secure, manageable, and compliant.
services.secure.page.features.title: Our services
services.secure.page.feature1.title: Data & access
services.secure.page.feature1.desc: Define which information may be used, who gets access, and how sensitive data remains protected.
services.secure.page.feature2.title: Compliance & policy
services.secure.page.feature2.desc: Translate regulations and internal agreements into clear rules for using AI across your organization.
services.secure.page.feature3.title: Secure setup
services.secure.page.feature3.desc: Set up tools, workflows, and vendor choices so your AI solutions remain reliable, controllable, and responsible.
services.secure.page.benefits.title: Benefits for your business
services.secure.page.benefit1.title: Peace of mind
services.secure.page.benefit1.desc: Innovate with AI knowing your data and systems are fully protected.
services.secure.page.benefit2.title: Regulatory compliance
services.secure.page.benefit2.desc: Stay ahead of GDPR, the EU AI Act, and industry regulations.
services.secure.page.benefit3.title: Client trust
services.secure.page.benefit3.desc: Demonstrate to clients and partners that your AI operations meet the highest security standards.
services.secure.page.cta.title: Ready to secure your AI?
services.secure.page.cta.text: Let's assess your current security posture and build a framework that protects your AI investments.
page.index.title: SmartAgents | AI & process automation solutions
page.index.description: SmartAgents builds AI solutions, agentic AI systems, and process automation for businesses in Belgium.
page.jobs.title: Jobs | SmartAgents
page.jobs.description: Join SmartAgents and build the future of AI. We're hiring an Agentic AI Developer to design and build autonomous AI agents.
page.ai.title: Artificial intelligence | SmartAgents
page.ai.description: Custom AI models and machine learning solutions tailored to your business needs. Predictive analytics, NLP, and intelligent automation by SmartAgents.
page.agentic.title: Agentic AI | SmartAgents
page.agentic.description: Autonomous AI agents that reason, plan, and execute complex tasks. Build intelligent systems that work alongside your team with SmartAgents.
page.automation.title: Automation | SmartAgents
page.automation.description: End-to-end automation solutions that reduce manual work and human error. RPA, workflow automation, and intelligent document processing by SmartAgents.
page.process.title: Process optimization | SmartAgents
page.process.description: Streamline workflows and eliminate inefficiencies. We analyze, redesign, and implement processes that maximize productivity.
page.secure.title: Security | SmartAgents
page.secure.description: Enterprise-grade security for your AI systems. Data protection, compliance frameworks, and secure deployment of automation workflows by SmartAgents.
page.training.title: Training | SmartAgents

page.customerzone.title: SmartAgents | Customer zone
page.customerzone.description: Log in to the SmartAgents customer zone to manage projects, track progress, and access your dashboard.
page.smartscan.title: Smart Scan | SmartAgents
page.smartscan.description: Discover where AI can have the most impact. Smart Scan maps your processes and bottlenecks clearly.
services.smartscan.page.subtitle: We map out where AI can realistically make a difference in your organization today — no hype, no vague promises.
services.smartscan.page.overview.title: What is a Smart Scan?
services.smartscan.page.overview.text1: AI offers enormous opportunities, but not every application fits every organization. A Smart Scan gives you a clear and realistic picture of where AI can already create value today — tailored to your context, priorities, and ambitions.
services.smartscan.page.overview.text2: We don't just look at what is possible, but above all at what is feasible, useful, and worth prioritizing today. Where is the biggest gain? What can create fast impact? And what is better left for later?
services.smartscan.page.item1.title: Internal operations & processes
services.smartscan.page.item1.desc: We investigate where time is being lost in your daily operations and where AI can realistically provide support today.
services.smartscan.page.item2.title: Marketing & communication
services.smartscan.page.item2.desc: We assess which marketing and communication processes can already deliver value today, and which applications are not yet a priority.
services.smartscan.page.item3.title: Data & information management
services.smartscan.page.item3.desc: We evaluate where data and information can already be used more effectively with AI, and what first needs to be in place.
services.smartscan.page.item4.title: Administration & tracking
services.smartscan.page.item4.desc: We map which administrative steps are best suited for automation or AI-supported improvement.
services.smartscan.page.item5.title: Sales & customer relationships
services.smartscan.page.item5.desc: We examine where AI can concretely strengthen sales and customer follow-up without adding unnecessary complexity.
services.smartscan.page.item6.title: Sector-specific processes
services.smartscan.page.item6.desc: We test which sector-specific opportunities are truly relevant for your context instead of copying generic use cases.
services.smartscan.page.deliverable1.des: A clear selection of the opportunities with the most relevant impact for your organization.
services.smartscan.page.deliverable2.des: We weigh impact, feasibility, complexity, and timing so you know where to start first.
services.smartscan.page.deliverable3.des: A realistic plan with quick wins, follow-up steps, and what is better left for later.
services.smartscan.page.deliverable4.des: We highlight what is needed around data, adoption, risk, and governance to make opportunities viable.
services.smartscan.page.benefits.title: What does it deliver?
services.smartscan.page.benefit1.title: No guesswork
services.smartscan.page.benefit1.desc: You know exactly where AI is and isn't valuable for your organization — backed by evidence, not gut feeling.
services.smartscan.page.benefit2.title: Quick first wins
services.smartscan.page.benefit2.desc: We identify quick wins that help your organization move forward immediately, without lengthy implementation projects.
services.smartscan.page.benefit3.title: One coherent vision
services.smartscan.page.benefit3.desc: Instead of isolated tools that exist side by side, you build a cohesive AI strategy that fits who you are.
services.smartscan.page.benefit4.title: Humans at the center
services.smartscan.page.benefit4.desc: AI supports your people, it doesn't replace them. We respect existing roles and build support together.
services.smartscan.page.benefit5.title: Concrete action plan
services.smartscan.page.benefit5.desc: You don't get a theoretical report, but a clear roadmap with priorities and achievable next steps.
services.smartscan.page.benefit6.title: Scalable foundation
services.smartscan.page.benefit6.desc: The recommendations aren't just for today — they lay the foundation for an organization that evolves with AI.
services.smartscan.page.process.title: How does a Smart Scan work?
services.smartscan.page.step1.title: Exploratory conversation
services.smartscan.page.step1.desc: We start with a no-obligation conversation to get to know your organization, ambitions and challenges.
services.smartscan.page.step2.title: Scope & approach
services.smartscan.page.step2.desc: Together we determine which processes and departments we examine and align the approach with your expectations.
services.smartscan.page.step3.title: In-depth analysis
services.smartscan.page.step3.desc: We go through your processes in detail, identify opportunities and carefully weigh feasibility, impact and priority.
services.smartscan.page.step4.title: Roadmap & delivery
services.smartscan.page.step4.desc: You receive a concrete implementation plan: clear, phased and directly usable as a guide for the next steps.
services.smartscan.page.cta.title: Ready to discover what AI can do for you?
services.smartscan.page.cta.text: Schedule a no-obligation conversation and we'll explore together where the biggest opportunities for your organization lie.
page.ontwerp.title: Design Phase | SmartAgents
page.ontwerp.description: From insight to architecture. We design a tailored solution: workflows, AI agents and integrations that truly fit your organization.
services.ontwerp.title: Design Phase
services.ontwerp.page.subtitle: We translate the insights from the Smart Scan into a concrete, achievable architecture — tailored to your processes and ambitions.
services.ontwerp.page.overview.title: What is the design phase?
services.ontwerp.page.overview.text1: After the Smart Scan, you know where AI can add value. In the design phase, we translate those insights into a concrete plan: which workflows do we optimize, which agents do we build, and how do we connect everything with your existing systems?
services.ontwerp.page.overview.text2: We don't think in isolated tools, but in coherent solutions. Every choice is motivated based on impact, feasibility, and your specific context — so you enter the development phase with confidence.
services.ontwerp.page.activities.title: What do we design?
services.ontwerp.page.item1.title: Workflow optimization
services.ontwerp.page.item1.desc: We redesign process flows to make them more efficient, more fault-tolerant, and ready for AI support.
services.ontwerp.page.item2.title: AI agent architecture
services.ontwerp.page.item2.desc: We determine which agents are built, what their role is, and how they work together to handle tasks autonomously.
services.ontwerp.page.item3.title: Automation strategy
services.ontwerp.page.item3.desc: We select the right automations for each step: from simple rules to complex, conditional flows.
services.ontwerp.page.item4.title: Integration plan
services.ontwerp.page.item4.desc: We map out how the new solution connects to your existing tools, data sources, and systems.
services.ontwerp.page.item5.title: Data structure & flow
services.ontwerp.page.item5.desc: We define what data is needed, where it comes from, and how it flows reliably and securely through the solution.
services.ontwerp.page.item6.title: Adoption & change management
services.ontwerp.page.item6.desc: We consider your team: who works with the solution, what the transition looks like, and what is needed for smooth adoption.
services.ontwerp.page.deliverables.title: What do you receive?
services.ontwerp.page.deliverable1.title: Functional specifications
services.ontwerp.page.deliverable1.desc: A clear overview of what the solution does, which steps are automated, and which agents take on which tasks.
services.ontwerp.page.deliverable2.title: Technical architecture
services.ontwerp.page.deliverable2.desc: A visual and descriptive architecture diagram with components, data flows, and integration points.
services.ontwerp.page.deliverable3.title: Integration overview
services.ontwerp.page.deliverable3.desc: An overview of connections to your existing systems and the requirements per integration.
services.ontwerp.page.deliverable4.title: Implementation plan
services.ontwerp.page.deliverable4.desc: A phased approach with priorities, dependencies, and a realistic timeline for the development phase.
services.ontwerp.page.benefits.title: What does it deliver?
services.ontwerp.page.benefit1.title: No surprises
services.ontwerp.page.benefit1.desc: You know exactly what will be built before development starts — no misinterpretations, no scope creep.
services.ontwerp.page.benefit2.title: Faster development
services.ontwerp.page.benefit2.desc: A solid design significantly accelerates the build phase: fewer course corrections, less rework, more focus.
services.ontwerp.page.benefit3.title: Tailored solution
services.ontwerp.page.benefit3.desc: The architecture is aligned with your processes, your systems, and your team — not a generic template, but a plan that fits.
services.ontwerp.page.benefit4.title: Better collaboration
services.ontwerp.page.benefit4.desc: The design is a shared reference point for your team, your IT department, and our developers. Everyone pulls in the same direction.
services.ontwerp.page.benefit5.title: Scalable foundation
services.ontwerp.page.benefit5.desc: We design with the future in mind: the architecture allows expansion without needing to rethink everything from scratch.
services.ontwerp.page.benefit6.title: Risk management
services.ontwerp.page.benefit6.desc: We identify technical and organizational risks early and incorporate them into the approach — before they become a problem.
services.ontwerp.page.process.title: How does the design phase work?
services.ontwerp.page.step1.title: Analysis of Smart Scan results
services.ontwerp.page.step1.desc: We start from the roadmap and priorities identified in the Smart Scan and together define the scope of the first design iteration.
services.ontwerp.page.step2.title: Workshops & co-design
services.ontwerp.page.step2.desc: We work together with your team on workflows, use cases, and requirements. Your knowledge of the processes, our expertise in AI and automation.
services.ontwerp.page.step3.title: Architecture & specifications
services.ontwerp.page.step3.desc: We document the technical architecture, data flows, and integrations in a clear and reviewable design document.
services.ontwerp.page.step4.title: Review & approval
services.ontwerp.page.step4.desc: We walk through the design together, answer questions, and incorporate feedback until all parties agree to start building.
services.ontwerp.page.cta.title: Ready to move from insight to action?
services.ontwerp.page.cta.text: Get in touch and we'll discuss what a design trajectory looks like for your organization.
page.ontwikkeling.title: Development | SmartAgents
page.ontwikkeling.description: We build your AI solution step by step, iteratively and transparently. You stay involved and quickly see what works in practice.
services.ontwikkeling.title: Development
services.ontwikkeling.page.subtitle: We build your solution iteratively, transparently and in close collaboration — so you always know what is being built and why.
services.ontwikkeling.page.overview.text: In the development phase, the design becomes reality. We build your AI agents, automations, and integrations step by step — in short cycles, so you see results quickly and can provide feedback for the next iteration.

We don't work for months in a black box to then deliver something. You are involved from start to finish: you see what is being built, test alongside us, and steer where needed. This way, the end result always matches what your organization truly needs.
services.ontwikkeling.page.item1.title: AI agents & autonomous workflows
services.ontwikkeling.page.item1.desc: We build agents that perform tasks autonomously, make decisions, and collaborate within your processes.
services.ontwikkeling.page.item2.title: Process automations
services.ontwikkeling.page.item2.desc: Repetitive and rule-driven tasks are automated so your team can focus on work with real added value.
services.ontwikkeling.page.item3.title: System integrations
services.ontwikkeling.page.item3.desc: We connect the new solution to your existing tools, platforms, and data sources via robust, maintainable integrations.
services.ontwikkeling.page.item4.title: Dashboards & reporting
services.ontwikkeling.page.item4.desc: We build overviews and reports that give you insight into the operation and results of your automated processes.
services.ontwikkeling.page.item5.title: Testing & quality assurance
services.ontwikkeling.page.item5.desc: Every component is thoroughly tested: functionally, technically, and in the context of your real business scenarios.
services.ontwikkeling.page.item6.title: Documentation & handover
services.ontwikkeling.page.item6.desc: We document what has been built — clearly, completely, and usable for your team and future extensions.
A fully functional, tested AI solution ready for use in your production environment.
A fully documented codebase with explanations of architecture, configuration, and maintenance.
An overview of executed tests, results, and handled edge cases — so you know exactly what the solution has been validated against.
Everything your team or IT department needs to independently manage, monitor, and extend the solution.
services.ontwikkeling.page.benefit1.desc: By working iteratively, you have working functionality early in the process — no months of waiting for a big bang delivery.
services.ontwikkeling.page.benefit2.desc: You follow progress closely, give feedback, and steer as needed. The end result is always what your organization actually needs.
services.ontwikkeling.page.benefit3.desc: We test thoroughly and iterate based on real feedback — no assumptions, no errors that only surface in production.
services.ontwikkeling.page.benefit4.desc: The solution connects seamlessly to your existing systems and ways of working, without major disruptions to daily operations.
services.ontwikkeling.page.benefit5.desc: We build modularly and with thorough documentation, so extensions or adjustments later remain simple and affordable.
services.ontwikkeling.page.benefit6.desc: Your team understands what has been built and can manage it independently. We don't build a black box, but a solution that is truly yours.
services.ontwikkeling.page.process.title: How does the development phase work?
services.ontwikkeling.page.step1.title: Kick-off & setup
services.ontwikkeling.page.step1.desc: We start with a brief kick-off, set up the development environment, and plan the first iteration based on the approved design.
services.ontwikkeling.page.step2.title: Iterative build cycles
services.ontwikkeling.page.step2.desc: We work in short sprints. After each cycle, we present what has been built, test together, and determine the priorities for the next step.
services.ontwikkeling.page.step3.title: Integration & system tests
services.ontwikkeling.page.step3.desc: We integrate the solution into your environment and run end-to-end tests to verify that everything works correctly together in realistic scenarios.
services.ontwikkeling.page.step4.title: Delivery & handover
services.ontwikkeling.page.step4.desc: We deliver the final solution with complete documentation and guide your team through the handover and first use.
services.ontwikkeling.page.cta.title: Ready to start building?
services.ontwikkeling.page.cta.text: Get in touch and we'll discuss what a development trajectory looks like for your organization.
page.implementatie.title: Implementation | SmartAgents
page.implementatie.description: From test environment to production — careful, controlled, and with your team on board. We make sure the transition goes smoothly.
services.implementatie.title: Implementation
services.implementatie.page.subtitle: The solution is built and tested. Now we embed it into your organization — technically, operationally, and humanly.
services.implementatie.page.overview.tex: Implementation is more than a technical rollout. It is the moment when a solution stops being a project and becomes part of how your organization works every day. That requires more than good code — it requires a careful transition, clear communication, and people who embrace the new way of working with confidence.

We guide the rollout step by step: from the final technical configuration to data migration and team training. Only when everything runs stably and your people feel confident do we officially close the implementation.
services.implementatie.page.activities.t: What do we do during implementation?
services.implementatie.page.item1.title: Production rollout
services.implementatie.page.item1.desc: We go live in a controlled manner in your production environment — phased where needed, with a clear fallback plan ready if required.
services.implementatie.page.item2.title: Data migration & validation
services.implementatie.page.item2.desc: Existing data is transferred, cleaned, and validated so the new solution works on correct and complete information from day one.
services.implementatie.page.item3.title: System configuration & fine-tuning
services.implementatie.page.item3.desc: We configure all parameters, connections, and permissions correctly for your specific environment and adjust where needed based on first live usage.
services.implementatie.page.item4.title: User training
services.implementatie.page.item4.desc: We train your team hands-on, focused on daily use and tailored to different roles and levels within your organization.
services.implementatie.page.item5.title: Monitoring & stabilization
services.implementatie.page.item5.desc: We actively monitor the solution during the first period after go-live and intervene proactively when deviations or unexpected behavior occur.
services.implementatie.page.item6.title: Communication & change management
services.implementatie.page.item6.desc: We support internal communication around the change so your employees understand what is changing, why, and what it means for them.
services.implementatie.page.deliverable1: A fully configured, stable, and secure production environment ready for daily use.
services.implementatie.page.deliverable2: Guides, videos, or workshops tailored to your team — so everyone can work independently and confidently with the new tools.
services.implementatie.page.deliverable3: An overview of what was rolled out, how the first period went, and which points of attention we carry into the optimization phase.
services.implementatie.page.deliverable4: Everything your IT team or administrators need to independently monitor, maintain, and extend the environment.
services.implementatie.page.benefit1.des: No sudden major changes or surprises for your team. We guide the transition so daily operations are disrupted as little as possible.
services.implementatie.page.benefit2.des: Because your people are well-prepared and understand what is changing, they start motivated and confident — rather than resistant.
services.implementatie.page.benefit3.des: We monitor actively and scale where needed, so the solution is reliable and performant in practice right from the start.
services.implementatie.page.benefit4.des: After implementation, your team can fully use and manage the solution independently — without depending on us for daily operations.
services.implementatie.page.benefit5.des: A phased rollout with fallback options ensures that any issues are addressed quickly and in a controlled manner, without impacting the core of your operations.
services.implementatie.page.benefit6.des: A well-implemented solution is the starting point for further optimization and expansion — not the endpoint of the journey.
services.implementatie.page.step1.title: Preparation & go-live plan
services.implementatie.page.step1.desc: We draw up a detailed rollout plan together: timing, communication, fallback scenarios, and role distribution so everyone knows what happens when.
services.implementatie.page.step2.title: Phased rollout
services.implementatie.page.step2.desc: We go live in controlled steps — first a pilot group or partial environment, then broader — so we can steer before the full rollout.
services.implementatie.page.step3.title: Training & guidance
services.implementatie.page.step3.desc: We guide your team through the first weeks: on-site or remotely, with hands-on training and direct support for questions in daily use.
services.implementatie.page.step4.title: Stabilization & handover
services.implementatie.page.step4.desc: Once everything runs stably and your team feels confident, we officially hand over and prepare the next phase: optimization and further growth.
services.implementatie.page.cta.title: Ready for an implementation without headaches?
services.implementatie.page.cta.text: Get in touch and we'll discuss how to make the transition as smooth as possible for your organization.
page.optimalisatie.title: Optimization & Support | SmartAgents
page.optimalisatie.description: AI solutions get better over time. We keep measuring, refining, and expanding so your investment continues to deliver returns.
services.optimalisatie.title: Optimization & Support
services.optimalisatie.page.subtitle: Go-live is not an endpoint — it's the beginning of a smarter organization. We stay by your side as your solution evolves.
services.optimalisatie.page.overview.tit: What is the optimization & support phase?
services.optimalisatie.page.overview.tex: An AI solution that is live is not finished — it is alive. Processes change, data evolves, your organization grows. The best solutions are not the ones that are delivered perfectly, but the ones that keep improving in contact with reality.

In this phase, we monitor performance, analyze where gains can be made, and continue building where it makes sense. At the same time, we are there for you when you have questions, something needs adjusting, or a new opportunity arises. Not a ticket system — a real partner.
services.optimalisatie.page.item1.title: Performance monitoring
services.optimalisatie.page.item1.desc: We actively track the operation of your agents and automations: speed, accuracy, error patterns, and deviations from expected results.
services.optimalisatie.page.item2.title: Continuous optimization
services.optimalisatie.page.item2.desc: Based on real usage data, we refine the logic, prompts, workflows, and parameters so the solution performs better over time.
services.optimalisatie.page.item3.title: Proactive maintenance
services.optimalisatie.page.item3.desc: We monitor dependencies, API updates, and platform changes and intervene before they affect your operations — not after.
services.optimalisatie.page.item4.title: Extensions & new features
services.optimalisatie.page.item4.desc: When you're ready for the next step — automating a new process, extending an agent, or adding an integration — we're ready to build quickly.
services.optimalisatie.page.item5.title: User support
services.optimalisatie.page.item5.desc: Your team can come to us with questions, reports, and advice. We respond quickly, think along, and resolve — without cumbersome procedures.
services.optimalisatie.page.item6.title: Strategic guidance
services.optimalisatie.page.item6.desc: We look at the longer term together: where are the next opportunities, how is the AI landscape evolving, and how does your organization stay ahead?
services.optimalisatie.page.deliverable1: A clear overview of performance, optimizations carried out, and recommendations for the next period.
services.optimalisatie.page.deliverable2: A continuously maintained list of improvement opportunities, sorted by impact and feasibility — so you always know what the next step is.
services.optimalisatie.page.deliverable3: A transparent overview of what was changed, when, and why — for full traceability and confidence.
services.optimalisatie.page.deliverable4: A deeper conversation about the evolution of your solution, new opportunities on the roadmap, and the strategic direction for the coming months.
services.optimalisatie.page.benefit1.des: Your investment doesn't just pay off at go-live — it grows in value as the solution becomes better tuned to your reality.
services.optimalisatie.page.benefit2.des: AI evolves fast. We ensure your solution keeps pace with new possibilities and that your competitive advantage is maintained.
services.optimalisatie.page.benefit3.des: Proactive maintenance and monitoring mean that issues are noticed and resolved before they impact your daily operations.
services.optimalisatie.page.benefit4.des: You work with a team that knows your solution inside out. No need to explain, no handover, no lost context — just fast, targeted help.
services.optimalisatie.page.benefit5.des: When your organization is ready for the next step, we can build quickly. No new trajectory, no new start — just keep growing.
services.optimalisatie.page.benefit6.des: You focus on your business. We make sure the technology does what it needs to do — quiet, reliable, and continuously improving support in the background.
services.optimalisatie.page.process.titl: What does ongoing support look like?
services.optimalisatie.page.step1.title: Onboarding & baseline
services.optimalisatie.page.step1.desc: Right after go-live, we establish the baseline: performance indicators, points of attention, and the first optimization priorities.
services.optimalisatie.page.step2.title: Monthly optimization cycle
services.optimalisatie.page.step2.desc: Each month we analyze the data, implement targeted improvements, and report transparently on what has been done and what we recommend.
services.optimalisatie.page.step3.title: On-demand support
services.optimalisatie.page.step3.desc: Interim questions, incidents, or new needs are picked up quickly — with a response time and priority aligned to your support package.
services.optimalisatie.page.step4.title: Quarterly review & roadmap update
services.optimalisatie.page.step4.desc: Every quarter we look back on the evolution together and forward to the next opportunities. Your roadmap stays alive, realistic, and aligned with your strategy.
services.optimalisatie.page.cta.title: Ready for a solution that keeps growing?
services.optimalisatie.page.cta.text: Get in touch and we'll discuss which support trajectory fits your organization and ambitions.
